content_fingerprint: llama cpp releases b8926 and b8925 with webgpu ssm scan support and parser fix the llama cpp project shipped two new releases in under 24 hours adding state space model scanning to its webgpu backend and squashing a structured output parsing bug the llama cpp project tagged two releases on april 25 2026 the first b8925 landed on april 24 and carried a parser fix for a structured output bug pr 22302 which the release notes describe with tongue in cheek brevity things just cannot be too easy the second b8926 arrived the next morning and introduces ssm scan support to the ggml webgpu backend via
